components.name: Presale
components.label: Presale Deck
components.description: Composes the status column and buy/stake tabs for the on-chain presale flow.

components.name: PresaleFaq
components.label: Presale FAQ
components.description: Accordion wrapper for the presale FAQ entries defined under the presale block.

components.name: MomentumCard
components.label: Presale Momentum Card
components.description: Standalone momentum card that mirrors the presale pulse stats and schedule copy.

components.name: HeroPresale
components.label: Presale Hero
components.description: Hero block that highlights the presale CTA, badge, and secondary actions.

components.name: ProgressFomo
components.label: Progress & FOMO Card
components.description: Standalone progress card featuring allocation sold, remaining supply, and next price schedule.

components.name: CuriosityTeaser
components.label: Curiosity Teaser
components.description: Secret-drop teaser with optional modal CTA and community links.

components.name: SocialProofFeed
components.label: Social Proof Feed
components.description: Curated social feed with share CTA and optional live community counter.

components.name: Tokenomics
components.label: Tokenomics Chart
components.description: Token allocation table paired with the radial chart.

components.name: Trust
components.label: Trust Section
components.description: Credentials and trust badges block rendered from the `trust` content node.

components.name: TrustBar
components.label: Trust Contract Bar
components.description: Sticky trust bar that surfaces audit/contract metadata and copying helpers.

components.name: CommunityStrip
components.label: Community Strip
components.description: Social proof rail with community links and optional email capture.

components.name: PresaleAdmin
components.label: Presale Admin Console
components.description: Operations panel for presale managers (pricing controls, flags, treasury actions).
